name: Leigh Taylor-Young
abstract: Leigh Taylor-Young (born January 25, 1945) is an American actress who has appeared on stage, screen, podcast, radio, and television. Her best-known films include I Love You, Alice B.

concerts.label: CityKids Speak at Carnegie Hall... Voices from the Front Line

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: I got a show with Ryan O’Neal and Leigh Taylor Young called “Under the Yum Yum Tree,” that was for ABC.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
